/tmp/codeql-scratch-9524bfdfb99fd29d/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -nostartfiles -static -T /home/runner/work/unhx/unhx/kernel/linker.ld -z max-page-size=4096 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/platform/boot.S.o CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/platform/gdt.c.o CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/platform/platform.c.o CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/ipc/ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/vm/vm.c.o CMakeFiles/unhx.elf.dir/kern/kern.c.o -o unhx.elf
